summary: Bug fix verification completed - Both bugs (message ordering and theme flickering) are FIXED and working correctly. Backend 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend all features tested successfully.

accessibility_warnings.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent components

react_warnings.issue: Cannot update a component while rendering a different component (BrowserRouter/LoginPage)
react_warnings.note: Not related to ThemeToggle fix - separate issue in login navigation

message_ordering.details: Messages are now displayed in chronological order (oldest at top, newest at bottom). Backend returns messages sorted by created_at DESC then reversed. Frontend renders in order received. New messages appear at bottom of chat.
message_ordering.frontend_verification: Screenshot confirms timestamps go 14:32 -> 14:32 -> 14:35 -> 14:37 -> 14:40 from top to bottom

theme_toggle_flicker.details: Theme toggle works without flickering or re-render loops. Performed 10 rapid clicks with no theme-related console errors. useMemo and useCallback fixes in ThemeContext.jsx are working.
theme_toggle_flicker.test_method: Rapid clicking test (10 clicks in quick succession)
theme_toggle_flicker.result: No re-render errors, smooth animation, theme changes correctly

critical_code_review_comments: LoginPage has setState during render issue - minor priority, doesn't affect functionality
DialogContent components should add aria-describedby for accessibility compliance
seed_data_creation: Used existing test users and conversation between test1 and test2
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two bugs were verified as fixed: 1) Message ordering - messages now display oldest-first (chronologically). 2) Theme toggle - no more flickering after useMemo/useCallback fixes. All core features working. Minor React warning in LoginPage about setState during render is unrelated to the bug fixes.
tests_passed: Backend: Messages in chronological order verification
Backend: Send message and verify appears at end
Frontend: Theme toggle rapid click (10x) - no flickering
Frontend: Messages display in correct order (oldest top, newest bottom)
Frontend: Send message works - appears at bottom
Frontend: New Chat dialog opens and user search works
